message:
chore: ignore rch release dirs and beads backup files in .gitignore

Add three ephemeral patterns:
- .rch-release-bin/ and .rch-release-root/: temporary directories
  created by the remote compilation helper during release builds
- .beads/*.bak_*: backup files created during beads conflict resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,6 +95,13 @@ ci-artifacts/
 proptest-regressions/
 test_meminfo
 
+# Remote compilation helper release artifacts
+.rch-release-bin/
+.rch-release-root/
+
+# Beads backup/conflict files
+.beads/*.bak_*
+
 # Agent session ephemeral files
 SESSION_TODO.md
 SESSION_REPORT.md
